task_completion.description: Two UR5 robots are loaded into the CoppeliaSim scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim window is visible, and the scene hierarchy or 3D view clearly shows two UR5 robot models.

task_completion.description: The robots are positioned correctly at [0.0, 0.0, 0.0] and [0.8, 0.0, 0.0].
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CoppeliaSim translation properties show the coordinates, or the 3D view shows the two robots separated by a distance along the X-axis.

task_completion.description: A script is created to control the robots via the ZMQ Remote API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A code editor displays a script (e.g., Python) that connects to CoppeliaSim on port 23000 and contains logic to rotate the base joints of both robots for concurrent and coordinated trials.

task_completion.description: The trial_logs.csv file is exported with the correct columns.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/trial_logs.csv exists and contains columns: trial_id, sim_time_s, robot_a_base_rad, robot_b_base_rad, collision_detected.

task_completion.description: The coordination_report.json file is exported with the correct fields.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, file manager, or text editor shows the file /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/coordination_report.json exists and contains fields: concurrent_trial_collision, coordinated_trial_collision, coordination_strategy.

integrity.description: The agent ran the CoppeliaSim simulation to generate the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: CoppeliaSim is seen running in the screenshots, and the simulation play button is active or the robots are seen in different poses.

integrity.description: The control script was executed in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows the command used to run the script (e.g., python script.py) and any resulting output.

integrity.description: The exported CSV and JSON files contain authentic simulation data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the CSV file show multiple rows of varying numerical data (sim_time_s, joint angles) rather than hardcoded or dummy text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output files are exactly /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/trial_logs.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/coordination_report.json. The CSV must contain columns: trial_id, sim_time_s, robot_a_base_rad, robot_b_base_rad, collision_detected. The JSON must contain fields: concurrent_trial_collision, coordinated_trial_collision, coordination_strategy.
